reviews.comment:
Hoy tuve la suerte de poder hacer el Registro Internacional, Le verdad que impecable, (no soy socio) pero la atención de Secretaria de caja, no se el nombre, impecable y super rápido menos de 15 minutos..!!! ahora la Secretaria Rubia,..papá..podría cambiar un poco la vibración bastante deja que desear por estar representando al ACA con tanto prestigio......igualmente siempre da gusto ir a cargar combustible..

(Translated by Google)
Today I was lucky enough to be able to do the International Registration. It was truly impeccable (I'm not a member), but the service from the cashier, whose name I don't know, was impeccable and super fast, less than 15 minutes! Now, the blonde secretary... well... she could change her attitude a bit. She leaves much to be desired, especially considering she's representing the ACA with such prestige... Even so, it's always a pleasure to go and fill up.
